positive: A stylized, abstract illustration of a celestial forest meeting a modern cityscape at dawn. Dominant subjects include stylized bioluminescent flora (mushrooms, ferns) entangled with geometric skyscrapers. The scene should evoke a magical, futuristic, yet calm atmosphere. Use a bold, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep indigo, cyan, electric violet, and soft gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, with clean, strong silhouettes for maximum apparel print appeal. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau organic flow and modern graphic linework, utilizing flat, vibrant color fields and precise vector-like edges. Cinematic, volumetric lighting that emphasizes sharp edges and glowing elements.
negative: low resolution, blurred, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, noisy, grain, bad anatomy, extra limbs, sloppy, poor composition, messy, photorealism, graffiti, dirty, grunge
